textByHash.005943210a0f246ffe87f339e59b232d82167152: There are some ancient goblin artefacts buried in the ground around here. We want to extract them, but we don't have much experience and could end up breaking them.
textByHash.019828d3d4f20bfc0b4a0122fa72e5556c8e0e01: I know. We found it lying around in the caves near the city, almost as if it had made its way back here and wanted to be found.
textByHash.05cd05f5d2b947ab672ac30276a3e6801ecb6e65: The helmet you helped to unearth has come in useful. I used it as a visual aid when I went to talk to the children in the nursery about our history.
textByHash.09bda1e42cb883d74605acce6e3f66f63fa7dbbc: I'm not sure. What do you think?
textByHash.0b11b55c1b20d609418ba25efe4f62bdcfb332dd: It looks like a fragment of armour.
textByHash.0b893faaa0ea57737042a10f74579532d33e80c7: That confirms that our ancestors retained a lot of customs from the surface even after they came down here. Our guards didn't start wearing lighter chainmail until after the Civil War.
textByHash.10268ff1aa7d3bbb0c210333ba1f2e7ac7dfabb7: It's covered in symbols, but I can't decipher them. Zanik, could you take it to the scribe? He might know what they mean. I'll finish up the dig here.
textByHash.125ae5d0c9aa99a0689196c1a417de7ba97d5447: It seems that even by the time of the Civil War, our ancestors were beginning to lose their skills at making weapons.
textByHash.1d93ed5d2c153525dc2cf36256e6212d19b35bfb: Could you extract them, clean them, and then give them to me please?
textByHash.3198bf2f33a2ecfa7413b5fdb7abfc35f9ee408d: Here, take this trowel and specimen brush.
textByHash.3d26a2bcc3ca7e73b952d97aeec0bfa6a32c0af1: If you want it back, I will sell it to you for 1,000 coins. That should discourage you from losing it again.
textByHash.43d1a07f4800b2213fa8a52b0732bea0168c7f11: Well you'll have to free up some inventory space before I can give you a new one.
textByHash.4c52679b2ea9a16be17061d65fe431e1df46532f: Oh! In that case we could use your help.
textByHash.510cb1a3d776e07d90d05e1de6d400add77dd33c: We used the armour fragment you unearthed to reconstruct the shape of the original armour, and with it the shape of the goblin who wore the armour.
textByHash.5faf41a2454ae1fc77e64d3b2de59af05ef49c54: Good idea! Maybe Oldak can help you get there.
textByHash.7270953b4e7b1b08a44d281bc4fe48a6037c1ac9: Perhaps there is some important knowledge that we have lost since the early, more war-like days of Dorgesh-Kaan.
textByHash.75689e54a3ecca25019d72adc539abce6d37821c: What? No, extract the artefacts please.
textByHash.7bb2fe0b22df22ef9c1c4356d8047a88585cda72: It's amazing to think that we're handling objects that date back to the time of the war of the gods!
textByHash.7fa15dc51fc87d2c5a4e641e7bd34e975af03073: It's amazing that the ancient goblins' eyes were even smaller than a child's!
textByHash.8238158360569175b835b1329076e1585bdce9a0: Bartak used the design of the shield you extracted to recreate a shield like it. Even though the original shield was poorly made, the design itself was a good one.
textByHash.833e7ea279e3a68651b1b6cd2a34cc53d67d699b: It's... Actually, what is it? It's a sort of stick with a lump on the end.
textByHash.8c8c676fb5e3efde1910a23e85a4ed1f4ec4362d: I've got a sample brush here but you'll have to make space in your inventory for me to give it to you.
textByHash.8d063a656aa370de0d2b8ec3fe5e4e18a7a957c8: Oldak examined the axe blade you dug up and found that it had a faint magical aura. It looks like the mace wasn't the only magical weapon our ancestors brought from the surface.
textByHash.985a100a825722383fd48a112814c245853b4bd9: Hello ! Thanks again for your help with the dig.
textByHash.9f03deb8698c55fa3bcdbbf75e7dbb52899c497c: Our ancestors must have brought it down from the surface, then. There would be no need for them to make axes when they were down here, as there are no trees.
textByHash.a43746f19381e2e49a8a1080a70ae7a5d423173f: The scribe thinks he has enough of them to begin understanding the ancient goblin language, but it will take a while for him to decipher them.
textByHash.a8154cd59b5e24a1927acf66e19f49fd7af78986: The early Dorgeshuun must have used a much larger variety of weapons than we do now.
textByHash.b7015d76265832ce829b545fadd2a9c757379f36: Look after it well. All the goblins who have handled it say it made them feel uneasy. We want it kept safe, but we don't want it near the city.
textByHash.b9585c11e47bad651e77b3d946e75bc0e68685f2: Thanks for your help. There's not much left for us to do here except pack everything up. Have you shown that mace to the scribe yet?
textByHash.bd1469d3b3eeb0d257dec9ae1bee3b1591fd9011: This told us a lot about how the goblin body shape changed from its surface form to that of the cave goblins.
textByHash.c07ca1c36508859a5a6350ade117b6f71f8a0758: Oh, hello surface-dweller. I'm afraid we're a bit busy cleaning specimens at the moment so I can't help you.
textByHash.c1b00645763af2b9864c7a879602f094a6ea384a: That's all the artefacts we needed to extract. Thanks again!
textByHash.c801a837f06018633133db19325675d2df5ae576: How are you getting on with extracting the artefacts?
textByHash.cdadea69384c65d09f109e1b73683ceea6fae168: In fact, it could be that a lot of their equipment was magical. This means that either the ancient goblins were skilled magical craftsmen, or some other power was supplying them with magical equipment.
textByHash.db48f7ab1e7e6b74dc083b0ca4b21513a023a8a0: Thanks for extracting that artefact, but you'll need to clean it as well.
textByHash.de3ae47b8ad5102cca12fb233e92f881a38be840: Here, use this brush to clean the artefact.
textByHash.e2f3618bdcb05d871841e11ce18b2b73c06709d8: It looks like a piece of a helmet.
textByHash.e301aa23188aa6cc9a239525c5bc769f02c9fdea: I'm not sure. It's got some kind of blade... Is it a spear tip?
textByHash.e5c8145cba32991b1503087fc0fd049f7eb5333e: It looks like a piece of a shield.
textByHash.eb35129df08c84df00b6c1539894842d71654cc4: When we examined the sword you dug up, we found that the blade is covered in tiny symbols.
textByHash.ef84b1fe5cb723621e6fd97003e316021e69109d: I would guess that this shield was made during the Dorgeshuun Civil War and not handed down from the time on the surface.
textByHash.f0a91d1c9dc9dd0a76256fe3354288ad00d47bd0: I know. Zanik says she found it lying around in the caves near the city, almost as if it had made its way back here and wanted her to find it.
textByHash.f8e9e206eedc7c4f6e925b6ba63d01bf7d36f308: Now, the most interesting one is this ancient mace. It's the only intact weapon, and I'm pretty sure it dates back to the time when the Dorgeshuun were on the surface.
textByHash.f91d43b7565c24771bed86e63f86e1abf8fa2ac1: This was from the early days of Dorgesh-Kaan. It must have been before our ancestors' eyes reached their current size.
textByHash.fa2733e10f46d3c7eb0f2452db41f05fa26dcb34: Well, you'll have to free up some inventory space before I can give you a new one.
